name: Orange Chocolate Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Peel and section the oranges. Cut the sections into small pieces.
2. Combine the orange pieces and orange juice in a large bowl.
3. In another bowl, beat eggs and add the orange mixture, vanilla extract, and almond extract. Mix well.
4. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, baking soda). Add them to the wet ingredients all at once and mix until just combined.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9x13 inch pan.
6. In a separate bowl, combine brown sugar, chocolate chips, and chopped walnuts.
7. Sprinkle this mixture on top of the cake batter.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 45-50 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
